privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introduction: fanmark.id ("we", "us", "our", or "Service") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and services.

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content:
We collect information in several ways:

• Account Information: When you create an account, we collect your email address, password (hashed), display name, and avatar image.

• Fanmark Data: Information about your emoji combinations (fanmarks) you create, including display names, access types, redirect URLs, and associated profile information.

• Usage Data: We collect information about how you interact with our Service, including search queries, access patterns, and actions taken.

• Communication Data: If you contact us, we may retain your messages and communications.

• Technical Data: We collect IP addresses, browser type, operating system, and device information through cookies and similar technologies.

howWeUseYourInformation.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUseYourInformation.content:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our Service
• Create and manage your account
• Process fanmark registrations, extensions, and returns
• Send transactional emails (confirmations, resets, notifications)
• Monitor and analyze service usage and trends
• Detect, prevent, and address fraud and security issues
• Comply with legal obligations
• Communicate with you about service updates and changes

dataSharing.title: 3. Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.content:
We do not sell your personal data. We may share information:

• With Service Providers: Third-party vendors who help operate our Service (hosting, email, analytics)
• For Legal Reasons: When required by law or to protect our rights
• Public Fanmark Data: Your fanmark and associated profile information may be visible to the public based on your privacy settings
• Anonymized Data: We may share aggregated, anonymized data for analytics and research

dataRetention.title: 4. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal data as long as your account is active and for a reasonable period afterward to comply with legal obligations. You can request deletion of your account, which will remove most personal data, though some information may be retained for legal or operational purposes.

security.title: 5. Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure authentication, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, remember preferences, and analyze usage patterns. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Some features may not work properly if cookies are disabled.

childrenPrivacy.title: 7. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our Service is not intended for individuals under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected such information, we will take steps to delete it promptly.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Privacy Rights
yourRights.content:
Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

• Access: Request access to your personal data
• Correction: Request correction of inaccurate data
• Deletion: Request deletion of your data
• Portability: Request a copy of your data in a structured format
• Opt-out: Unsubscribe from marketing communications

To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@fanmark.id

thirdPartyLinks.title: 9. Third-Party Links
thirdPartyLinks.content: Our Service may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party sites. Please review their privacy policies before providing personal information.

changesTopolicy.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changesTopolicy.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy and updating the "Last updated" date. Continued use of the Service indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.

contactUs.title: 11. Contact Us
contactUs.content:
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

Email: privacy@fanmark.id

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.introduction: These Terms of Service ("Terms", "Agreement") form a legally binding contract between you ("User", "you", "your") and the operator of Fanmark ("Service", "Operator", "we", "us", "our"). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

useAgreement.title: 1. Use Agreement
useAgreement.content:
You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe upon the rights of others or restrict their use and enjoyment of the Service. Prohibited behavior includes:

• Harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any person
• Obscene or offensive content
• Disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within the Service
• Registering fanmarks for spam, phishing, or malicious purposes
• Violating intellectual property rights
• Unauthorized access or data collection

accountResponsibility.title: 2. Account and Registration
accountResponsibility.content:
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate, complete, and current information during registration. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

Invitation Code: Access to the Service may require an invitation code. Invitation codes are non-transferable and can be revoked at any time.

fanmarkRights.title: 3. Fanmark Ownership and Rights
fanmarkRights.content:
Each fanmark (emoji combination) has ownership limitations:

• You may own multiple fanmarks up to your plan limit
• Fanmarks are granted on a license basis for specified periods
• You retain rights to content you create (profiles, messages, etc.)
• The Operator retains all rights to the fanmark platform, technology, and infrastructure
• Fanmark Transfer: You may transfer fanmarks to other users through the approved transfer feature
• Transfer License Terms: Upon transfer completion, the recipient receives a new license period based on the fanmark's tier (remaining period is not transferred)
• Transfer Finality: Approved transfers cannot be reversed or cancelled
• User Transaction Disclaimer: The Operator is not involved in and bears no responsibility for any monetary transactions or agreements between users related to fanmark transfers. This includes, but is not limited to, payment failures, fraud, and other disputes
• Self-Responsibility: All fanmark transfers are conducted at your own risk
• Unused fanmarks may enter a grace period before becoming available to others

fanmarkRetention.title: 4. Fanmark License Terms
fanmarkRetention.content:
Fanmark licenses are subject to:

• License Period: Initial license duration varies by fanmark tier (1-5 emojis)
• Perpetual Licenses: Fanmarks with 4+ emojis receive perpetual, non-expiring licenses (may be subject to future changes)
• Paid Fanmarks: Premium fanmarks (1-3 emojis) require renewal through our payment system
• License Renewal: You may extend licenses before expiration
• Grace Period: Upon expiration, a grace period allows renewal before the fanmark becomes available to others
• Return: You may voluntarily return a fanmark at any time

paymentTerms.title: 5. Payment and Billing
paymentTerms.content:
Some fanmarks require payment for licensing:

• Pricing: Prices are displayed before purchase and may change with notice
• Payment Processing: Payments are processed through Stripe and subject to their terms
• Billing: You authorize the Operator to charge your payment method for renewal fees
• No Refunds: License fees are non-refundable except as required by law
• Failed Payments: Failure to pay may result in suspension or revocation of licenses
• Tax: You are responsible for any applicable taxes

userContent.title: 6. User Content
userContent.content:
You grant the Operator a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, and display your user-generated content (profiles, messages, avatars, etc.) for providing and improving the Service.

• You retain ownership of your content
• You warrant that your content does not infringe on third-party rights
• You are solely responsible for the content you create
• We may remove content that violates these Terms

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The Service, including all code, design, features, and functionality, is owned by the Operator. All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may not reproduce, distribute, or transmit the Service or its content without permission.

limitationOfLiability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content:
TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:

• The Service is provided on an "as-is" basis without warranties of any kind
• The Operator is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
• The Operator's total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid in the past 12 months
• Some jurisdictions do not allow liability limitations, which may not apply to you

disclaimers.title: 9. Disclaimers
disclaimers.content:
• We make no warranties regarding the Service's uninterrupted or error-free operation
• We are not responsible for third-party services, links, or content
• Data loss or service interruptions may occur; backup your important data
• We do not guarantee fanmark availability or permanence

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.content:
You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the Operator and its affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from:

• Your use of the Service
• Your violation of these Terms
• Your violation of third-party rights
• Your user-generated content

suspensionTermination.title: 11. Suspension and Termination
suspensionTermination.content:
The Operator may suspend or terminate your account if you:

• Violate these Terms
• Engage in illegal or fraudulent activity
• Harass other users
• Create objectionable content
• Violate intellectual property rights
• Fail to pay fees

Termination may be immediate without notice for serious violations.

serviceTermination.title: 12. Service Termination and Discontinuation
serviceTermination.content:
Service Termination Notice: The Operator may discontinue or materially modify the Service at any time. The Operator will provide at least 6 months' prior notice to all active users if the Service is terminated.

Service Guarantee Period: After a service termination decision, the Service will continue to operate for at least 6 months until the termination date. Existing licenses will remain valid during this period.

License Extensions:
• License extensions have a maximum of 6 months per extension
• Multiple extensions may result in a license period exceeding 6 months
• If a license period exceeds 6 months, periods beyond 6 months may not be guaranteed in the event of service termination
• New license extensions may be suspended after service termination is announced

No Refunds:
• Purchased license extension fees are non-refundable for any reason
• No refunds will be provided for purchased license periods in the event of service termination
• No refunds will be provided for periods extending beyond the service termination date

User Data: Upon Service termination, the Operator will:
• Provide a reasonable opportunity (at least 60 days from the service termination date) to retrieve or export your data
• Make reasonable efforts to facilitate data export in a standard, portable format
• Retain your data according to applicable laws and our Privacy Policy

Limitation of Liability: Provided the notice and data export procedures outlined above are followed, the Operator is not liable for any loss of data, business, profits, or opportunities resulting from Service termination. By accepting these Terms, you acknowledge and accept the risks associated with license periods extending beyond the service termination date.

governing.title: 13. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where the Operator operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.

disputeResolution.title: 14. Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.content:
Any disputes shall be resolved through:

• Good Faith Negotiation: First, parties will attempt to resolve disputes through discussion
• Mediation: If negotiation fails, disputes may be submitted to mediation
• Arbitration/Litigation: If mediation fails, disputes shall be resolved through arbitration or court proceedings as applicable by law

changes.title: 15. Changes to Terms
changes.content: The Operator may modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated through email or prominent notification on the Service. Continued use after changes indicates acceptance of the updated Terms.

severability.title: 16. Severability
severability.content: If any provision of these Terms is found invalid, that provision will be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid, or removed if necessary. The remaining provisions will continue in effect.

entireAgreement.title: 17. Entire Agreement
entireAgreement.content: These Terms, along with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and the Operator regarding your use of the Service.

contactUs.title: 18. Contact Us
contactUs.content:
If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Email: legal@fanmark.id

about.title: About Fanmark
about.subtitle: Your Unique Link with Emoji
about.introduction:
Fanmark is a service where you can claim and hold emoji combinations as your unique ID.

Each fanmark gets a dedicated link like fanmark.id/🍎🍊, which you can configure as a profile page, redirect, or message board.

uniqueId.title: Emoji as Your ID
uniqueId.description: Combine 1-5 emojis to create your unique ID. Shorter combinations are rarer, while longer ones are easier to claim.

threeWays.title: Three Ways to Use
threeWays.description: Choose from redirect (forward to any URL or phone number), profile page, or message board.

tierSystem.title: Tier-Based Licensing
tierSystem.description: The number of emojis determines your tier and initial license period. 4+ emojis are perpetual; 1-3 require paid renewal.

transfer.title: Transfer & Lottery
transfer.description: Generate transfer codes to give your fanmark to others. You can also enter a lottery for returned fanmarks.

step1.title: Search for Fanmarks
step1.description: Enter 1-5 emojis to check availability and tier (license period).

step2.title: Sign Up & Claim
step2.description: Create an account with an invitation code and claim your fanmark. You can hold multiple fanmarks up to your plan limit.

step3.title: Set Access Type
step3.description: Choose redirect, profile, or message board. You can also add password protection.

step4.title: Share Your Link
step4.description: Access your fanmark at fanmark.id/🍎🍊. Share via social media or QR code.

redirect.title: Redirect
redirect.description: Instantly forward to any external URL or phone number.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Create a page with your bio and social links.

messageboard.title: Message Board
messageboard.description: Display a text message with copy functionality.

tiers.title: Tiers & Pricing
tiers.description: Fewer emojis means higher rarity, so shorter fanmarks have limited license periods requiring renewal.

creators.title: Creators
creators.description: Consolidate links to your portfolio and social media with emojis that represent your work.

businesses.title: Shops & Businesses
businesses.description: Create pathways to booking pages or menus with emojis that match your brand.

communities.title: Communities
communities.description: Link to event announcements or member recruitment with emojis that represent your team.

cta.title: Let's Get Started
cta.description: Find the perfect emoji for you and experience Fanmark.

commercialTransactions.title: Commercial Transactions Act Disclosure
commercialTransactions.introduction: In accordance with the Act on Specified Commercial Transactions, we disclose the following.

location.title: Business Address
location.content:
Aoyama Marutake Bldg 6F
3-1-36 Minamiaoyama, Minato-ku, Tokyo 107-0062, Japan

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.content:
Shown on each product page
*All displayed prices include tax.

additionalFees.title: Additional Fees
additionalFees.content: None. (Internet connection fees and other telecom charges are the customer's responsibility.)

paymentTiming.title: Payment Timing
paymentTiming.content: Charged according to your credit card company's billing cycle.

deliveryTiming.title: Delivery Timing
deliveryTiming.content: Available immediately after payment is completed.

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellations/Returns
cancellationPolicy.content: Because the product is digital content, we generally cannot accept cancellations or returns after payment. Exceptions may be made if the product is defective.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contactUs.introduction: For questions, feedback, or bug reports about Fanmark, please reach out to us on X.

x.title: Contact via X
x.description: For service questions, feature requests, and bug reports, feel free to send us a DM or mention.
x.note: We typically respond within a few days

email.title: Legal Inquiries
email.description: Please use email only for legal matters, privacy concerns, or official correspondence.
email.note: We may not respond to general inquiries via email

notFound.title: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
notFound.hint: Don't worry if you're lost, your fanmark will guide you ✨

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.description: We're sorry, something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: You don't have permission to view this page. Please log in or access with the correct account.

analytics.creatorRequired: Available for Creator plan and above

transfer.sectionNotice: The operator does not intervene in any transactions or monetary exchanges between users. Please transfer at your own responsibility.
transfer.nextActionShareCode: Share this code with the recipient to continue the transfer.
transfer.nextActionWaitingApproval: Waiting for the owner to approve. No action needed right now.
transfer.statusSummaryIssued: Transfer code issued. A pending request will appear here once someone applies.

stepDetail.issueShare: Share this code with the recipient so they can apply.
stepDetail.waitForRequest: Waiting for the recipient to submit the code.
stepDetail.reviewRequests: Review incoming applications and approve or reject.
stepDetail.appliedInfo: You have applied for this fanmark. Awaiting owner approval. Applied at {date}.
stepDetail.waitForApproval: Waiting for the owner to approve your request.
stepDetail.applyReceivedOwner: {user} submitted a transfer request. Please review and approve or reject.
stepDetail.complete: Transfer completes after approval and will appear in your fanmarks.
stepDetail.receiverIssueInfo: The fanmark owner has issued a transfer code.

issueDialog.title: Issue Transfer Code
issueDialog.disclaimerItem1: Transfer cannot be undone after approval
issueDialog.disclaimerItem2: The operator is not involved in and takes no responsibility for transactions involving monetary or other consideration
issueDialog.disclaimerItem3: The operator takes no responsibility for any disputes between users related to transfers (non-payment, fraud, etc.)
issueDialog.disclaimerItem4: After transfer, the recipient will receive a new license period based on the tier
issueDialog.disclaimerItem5: Any paid license/extension time you purchased will not carry over and will be forfeited upon transfer (non-refundable)
issueDialog.agreeCheckbox: I understand and agree to the above

inputDialog.title: Enter Transfer Code
inputDialog.description: Enter the transfer code you received from the fanmark owner.
inputDialog.disclaimerItem2: The operator is not involved in and takes no responsibility for transactions involving monetary or other consideration
inputDialog.disclaimerItem3: The operator takes no responsibility for any disputes between users related to transfers (non-payment, fraud, etc.)
inputDialog.disclaimerItem4: After transfer, you will receive a tier-based initial license period (remaining period is not transferred)
inputDialog.agreeCheckbox: I understand and agree to the above

approvalDialog.title: Approve Transfer Request
approvalDialog.description: Transfer {fanmark} to {username}? This action cannot be undone.

error.limitExceededDetail: You currently own {{current}} fanmarks and have reached your plan limit of {{limit}}. To accept this transfer, please return unused fanmarks or upgrade your plan.
error.insufficientLicense: Cannot issue transfer code with less than 48 hours remaining
error.pendingRequest: Cannot issue new code while a request is pending approval
error.transferInProgress: This operation is not allowed during transfer
error.transferLocked: Transfer code issuance is temporarily locked
error.transferLockedDetail: You cannot issue a transfer code until {{date}}
error.disclaimerRequired: Agreement to the notice is required
